metadata.description: 8 Claude Code plugins orchestrated as an agency — Engineering, Marketing, Sales, and ESG teams.

plugins.name: ai-engineering
plugins.description: Model engineering workflows across training, inference, optimization, RAG, and serving. 50 skills.

plugins.name: growth-content
plugins.description: Content strategy, SEO, campaigns, analytics, and CRO workflows. 10 skills.

plugins.name: quality-monitoring
plugins.description: LLM evaluation benchmarks and observability tracking. 6 skills.

plugins.name: sales-outreach
plugins.description: Voice qualification and outreach automation. 1 skill.

plugins.name: scope3-strategy
plugins.description: CSRD/DMA strategy, materiality workflows, AI risk scanning, regulatory evidence. 7 domain skills.

plugins.name: scope3-calculation
plugins.description: Scope 3 carbon calculation, spend baselines, factor mapping, ingestion pipelines. 12 domain skills.

plugins.name: scope3-execution
plugins.description: Execution pipelines, disclosure intel, supplier scorecards, survey cascade. 8 domain skills.

plugins.name: scope12-accounting
plugins.description: Scope 1 and 2 accounting — method rules, KPI normalization, reporting assurance. 4 domain skills.
